# Cambridge Collective LLC
> Private art advisory firm specializing in off-market acquisitions of blue-chip artworks for collectors, family offices, and institutions worldwide. Founded at the Harvard Innovation Labs at Harvard Business School. Over $700M in advised artworks across private sales, auction advisory, and collection counsel.

## About the Firm
- https://www.cambridgecollectivellc.com/about.html

## Services
- https://www.cambridgecollectivellc.com/services.html

## Market Intelligence
- https://www.cambridgecollectivellc.com/insights.html

## Contact
- https://www.cambridgecollectivellc.com/contact.html

## Founding Partners
- Ram Solanki — Founding Partner. Collector with family background in 17th–18th century Old Masters; patron of the Museum of Fine Arts, Boston; pursuing graduate study at Harvard.
- Larry Whitlock — Founding Partner. Business Director at Naval Sea Systems Command; collector focused on the Napoleonic era; holds degrees from Harvard (MLA), University of Maryland (MBA), and Johns Hopkins (MS Systems Engineering).
- Arjun Garg — Founding Member. Finance background in private equity, venture capital, and real estate; graduate of Boston College Carroll School of Management; networks spanning South Asia, Middle East, and the United States.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2023
- Headquarters: 50 Follen Street, Suite 507, Cambridge, MA 02138
- Phone: +1 (857) 376-9873
- Email: inquiries@cambridgecollectivellc.com
- Areas of expertise: Pablo Picasso, Francis Bacon, Claude Monet, Andy Warhol, Gerhard Richter, Rembrandt van Rijn, Old Masters, Post-War Art, French Impressionism
- Service model: Private mandate-based; no public inventory; full price transparency
